steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The goal is to “emphasize the umami intensity of ma-konbu”—so the response must directly state that ma-konbu possesses strong umami, not define umami in general or describe ma-konbu's origin.

steps.title: Select the choice that directly emphasizes umami intensity
steps.content:
D states that participants found ma-konbu's umami intensity to be high.
  • A defines umami without mentioning ma-konbu
  • B focuses on geographic origin
  • C names ma-konbu as a source without establishing its intensity as high
.

This direct statement of ma-konbu's high umami intensity is the correct answer.
